description_long: This object is a stylized, cartoonish crustacean resembling a crab, with a rounded, segmented body painted in red, blue, and purple horizontal bands. It features two large, red claws with jagged pincers, each attached to articulated arms that extend outward. The head is conical and topped with two long, greenish eye stalks, each ending in a black-tipped eye. A rectangular, open mouth is set into the front of the body, and two small, black wheels or feet are visible at the base. The back of the object is smooth and rounded, with no additional appendages or features. The overall appearance is playful and mechanical, suggesting a robotic or animated interpretation of a crab.
description: A colorful, cartoon-like crab with large red claws, green eye stalks, and a segmented, rounded body. It has a mechanical, playful appearance with a prominent open mouth and small wheels or feet.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open rectangular mouth, both large red claws raised, and the two green eye stalks clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the object's depth, the protruding mouth, and the thickness of the claws and arms, with one eye stalk visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, rounded back, both claws extended outward, and the eye stalks from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the body’s curvature, the side of the mouth, and the arm and claw structure, with one eye stalk visible.
